name: Gentle Lentil Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch Spinach, chard, or collards, washed and chopped coarsely
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onions, garlic, and celery; sauté for 5-10 minutes until softened.
2. Stir in lentils and water or stock. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer until lentils are very soft. If the soup is too thick, add more liquid as needed.
3. Add chopped greens, salt, and pepper. Continue simmering for 10 additional minutes until the greens are tender.
4. Stir in lemon juice right before serving. Serves 16 preschoolers or 12 school-age children.
